sidebar.subtitle: Frontend architecture, design systems and product focus.
sidebar.degreeCore: Core: Java, Python, JS, SQL, Android & Cloud Computing.

automind.h1: Drive the frontend of the next generation of AUTOLOAD — rebuilt from the ground up as a modular SaaS product in Next.js 14, React 18 and TypeScript on a .NET 8 backend with SignalR and multi-tenant PostgreSQL — replacing the previous on-premise system (.NET + Vue) and cutting new-client install time by ~70%.
automind.h2: Reduced the frontend build pipeline from 12 to 4 minutes (~67%) by fixing a Node + Tailwind CSS misconfiguration, unblocking faster deploy cycles for the entire team.
automind.h3: Created and maintain @automind/react-components — a design system built on Radix UI, Storybook and Chromatic — standardizing the UI across 2 products and eliminating component rewrites between frontend teams.
automind.h4: Implemented Vitest and Playwright in the Azure DevOps pipeline covering critical flows with unit and E2E tests, blocking regressions before release via smoke tests on PR and full regression in CI.
automind.h5: Run daily code reviews and mentor ~5 junior developers, and write specs and requirements documentation directly with product stakeholders.

branddi.h1: Architected an end-to-end infringement management platform now serving 300+ global brands, with a NestJS/REST core integrated with Pipefy via GraphQL, processing 6M+ sponsored ads and ~2,500 unfair competition cases per month.
branddi.h2: Reduced report dashboard response times from ~7 minutes to low milliseconds by applying server-side downsampling, streamed responses and lazy-loaded time series.
branddi.h3: Built Go workers consuming RabbitMQ queues to process crawled data in real time from 3 marketplaces and search engines, feeding the detection pipeline that protects R$250M+ in annual institutional CPC.
branddi.h4: Built the observability stack from scratch (centralized logs in Papertrail, health checks and downtime alerts), reducing failure-to-fix time to near-instant by notifying the team at the moment of incident.
branddi.h5: Led code reviews, defined the team's unit testing strategy and automated AWS deploys via GitHub Actions, standardizing the CI/CD flow for continuous delivery.

eisa.h1: Automated the E2E test suite for VIVO systems with 90M+ subscribers using Selenium WebDriver, Cucumber and Ruby, covering critical provisioning flows and guaranteeing full regression before each release.
eisa.h2: Validated asynchronous flows in Apache Kafka and ran complex PL/SQL (Oracle) scripts on Linux, isolating bugs in data pipelines that impacted billing.
eisa.h3: Led the migration of the legacy monorepo from TortoiseSVN to GitLab, modernizing the version-control workflow for ~20 engineers and unblocking modern CI/CD pipelines.

parallel.h1: Built full-stack features in React (frontend) and Node.js (backend) for a sales platform, contributing to continuous product conversion improvements.
parallel.h2: Created auxiliary Python APIs and managed MySQL data persistence for internal product team workflows.

skills.title: Technical Skills
skills.agentSkillsDesc: Modular skills for generative agents — each skill is self-contained with docs, rules and references.
skills.wigDesc: Personalized feed with geo + affinity scoring, Redis caching and cron-driven push notifications. Stripe subscriptions, Supabase Auth with RLS, rate limiting via proxy and standalone PWA.
skills.jacosegDesc: Conversion-focused landing page with responsive web design. Internal dashboard with Prisma + PostgreSQL multi-branch, NextAuth with RBAC, server actions with Zod validation and drag-and-drop tables.
skills.biancaDesc: Custom landing page with serif typography, Framer Motion animations and a layout designed to convey warmth. Firebase Auth, reCAPTCHA-protected form and email delivery via Nodemailer.
skills.portfolioDesc: SSG with ISR, Server Components with Suspense and resilient fetching (Promise.allSettled + timeout). Build-time PDF CV, open source via GitHub API, command palette (cmdk), theme toggle with View Transitions API and SoundCloud player via Widget API.
